mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_asset (owner_user_id, kind, ref_type, ref_id, original_name, content_type, size_bytes, storage_key) VALUES (#{ownerUserId}, #{kind}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{originalName}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{storageKey})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM file_asset WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND kind IN ('RESUME', 'PORTFOLIO') ORDER BY id
SELECT file.* FROM file_asset file JOIN users owner ON owner.id = file.owner_user_id WHERE owner.status = 'DELETED' AND file.kind IN ('RESUME', 'PORTFOLIO') ORDER BY file.id LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM file_asset WHERE kind = 'ATTACHMENT' AND ref_type = 'COLLAB_MESSAGE' AND ref_id IS NULL AND created_at < #{cutoff} ORDER BY created_at, id LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM file_asset WHERE kind = 'ATTACHMENT' AND ref_type = 'AUTO_PREP_PENDING' AND ref_id IS NULL AND created_at < #{cutoff} ORDER BY created_at, id LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM file_asset WHERE kind IN ('AUDIO', 'VIDEO') AND ref_type = 'INTERVIEW_ANSWER' AND ref_id IS NULL AND created_at < #{cutoff} ORDER BY created_at, id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT f.* FROM file_asset f WHERE f.kind IN ('AUDIO', 'VIDEO') AND f.ref_type = 'INTERVIEW_ANSWER' AND f.ref_id IS NOT NULL AND f.created_at < #{cutoff} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM interview_answer a WHERE a.id = f.ref_id ) ORDER BY f.created_at, f.id LIMIT #{limit}
